patterns.description: Use literal white as the primary light surface through semantic surface tokens, with dark and forced-color mappings supplied by the theme contract.
Use precise ink-like borders, dividers, and structural lines rather than floating card decoration.
Use deliberate label, value, context, and machine-text hierarchy with the shared semantic typography tokens.
Use the shared two-layer focus-visible treatment with forced-colors mapping and no color-only focus cue.
Use restrained green semantic signals for selected, confirmed, or ready states when text or shape also conveys meaning.
Use restrained violet semantic signals for secondary context, provenance, comparison, or evidence states.
Use aligned rails, measured spacing, flush regions, and visible state structure from the Living Workbench language.
Use motion only to clarify state or spatial change, with a complete reduced-motion fallback.
Use semantic radius tokens with no rendered corner radius greater than 16 CSS pixels.
Use a stable contextual status or validation rail that avoids layout jumps and never relies on color alone.
Use shared selected and pressed treatments with clear text, shape, or border state in every color mode.
Use the shared coarse-pointer target treatment without visually inflating every control or replacing native interaction.
